summary: All bug fixes VERIFIED: 1) Contract email P0 fix - emailSent field returns true when sending to verified owner email (emmanuelobokoh03@gmail.com), comprehensive logging visible in backend logs. 2) Inquiry form fixes - all text readable with proper contrast, label shows 'Project Category *' (not 'Service TextT *'), dropdown text dark and readable, form submits successfully.

POST /api/contracts/:contractId/send - Returns emailSent: true for verified owner email
POST /api/contracts/:contractId/send - Response includes emailSent, contract, message fields
POST /api/contracts/:contractId/send - Contract status changes to SENT
POST /api/contracts/:contractId/send - External email returns emailSent: false (Resend sandbox limitation)
Contract send endpoint logging visible in backend logs ([CONTRACT SEND], [EMAIL])
Inquiry form at /inquiry - All headings readable (text-gray-900 class)
Inquiry form - Label correctly shows 'Project Category *'
Inquiry form - Service dropdown text readable (text-text-primary class)
Inquiry form - Budget Range dropdown text readable
Inquiry form - Form submits successfully (shows Thank You! message)
critical_code_review_comments: Contract send endpoint (contracts.ts lines 299-364) correctly returns emailSent boolean in response
Contract endpoint logs to console with [CONTRACT SEND] prefix for debugging
Inquiry form (SubmitInquiry.tsx) uses text-gray-900 for headings, text-text-primary for inputs/dropdowns
Label correctly shows 'Project Category' not 'Service TextT'
seed_data_creation: Test leads and contracts created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both P0 bugs verified fixed: 1) Contract emails now return emailSent: true when sending to verified owner email (emmanuelobokoh03@gmail.com), with proper logging. External emails return emailSent: false due to Resend sandbox limitation (not a code bug). 2) Inquiry form has all text readable with proper contrast, label shows 'Project Category *', dropdown text is dark not white.
